burst.ParentFunc: atomflow_controller(unsigned char, float, int, int, int, atom_location*, int, int, hls::burst_maxi<ap_uint<512> >, float*, int*, hls::burst_maxi<ap_uint<512> >, int, int, float*, int, int, unsigned char volatile*, unsigned int, unsigned int, unsigned int, unsigned int, hls::stream<ap_uint<512>, 0>&, unsigned int*)

burst.msg_body: Performing burst_maxi read of length 62 and bit width 512 on bundle 'gmem5'. These burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation, based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.
burst.ParentFunc: Image_extract_next(int, hls::stream<local_image_info, 0>&, hls::burst_maxi<ap_uint<512> >, float (*) [31], hls::burst_maxi<ap_uint<512> >, float (*) [31], float*, float&) (.1)

burst.msg_body: Performing burst_maxi read of variable length and bit width 512 on bundle 'gmem6'. These burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation, based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.
burst.ParentFunc: Image_extract_next(int, hls::stream<local_image_info, 0>&, hls::burst_maxi<ap_uint<512> >, float (*) [31], hls::burst_maxi<ap_uint<512> >, float (*) [31], float*, float&) (.1)

burst.msg_body: Multiple burst writes of variable length and bit width 32 in loop 'VITIS_LOOP_136_1' has been inferred on bundle 'gmem3'. These burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation, based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.
